profile.name: Keshav Singh
profile.tagline: Helping brands scale creativity, content, and growth through Generative AI and strategic storytelling.
profile.role: Gen AI Strategist | AI Content Systems Designer | Growth Consultant
profile.specialization: Generative AI · Content Strategy · AI Video Production
profile.bio: I am a Gen AI Strategist with experience in leveraging artificial intelligence to create high-impact content, visual campaigns, and scalable creative workflows for brands. I specialize in combining AI tools with business strategy to help companies reduce production time, improve content quality, and strengthen brand positioning. My work spans luxury products, retail destinations, digital marketing, and thought leadership content.

experience.summary: Developing AI-powered creative campaigns, branded content systems, and visual storytelling frameworks for luxury, lifestyle, retail, and commercial brands using advanced Generative AI tools.
highlights: Delivered AI-generated content campaigns for premium brands including AROME, CS Jewels, Solitario, AeroMall Pune, and Mantri Mall Bangalore.
Built end-to-end AI creative workflows using Google Flow, Higgsfield, GPT, Claude, and Grok, significantly reducing content production timelines.
Created cinematic AI-generated advertisements, luxury product campaigns, LinkedIn thought leadership content, and social-first video assets.

experience.summary: Worked on SEO, email marketing, and digital campaign execution to improve brand visibility and engagement.
highlights: Conducted keyword research and SEO optimization initiatives.
Supported digital marketing campaigns through data-backed insights and performance analysis.

experience.summary: Managed social media content and engagement initiatives to improve digital presence and community interaction.
highlights: Increased audience engagement through targeted content strategies.
Supported brand awareness campaigns across multiple platforms.
Contributed to content planning and execution for business growth.

projects.title: AROME Luxury Fragrance Campaign
projects.subtitle: AI-powered luxury storytelling for a premium fragrance brand.
projects.description: Created cinematic product advertisements, visual concepts, and AI-generated campaign assets designed to communicate elegance, sophistication, and luxury. Built scalable workflows for premium content production.

projects.subtitle: Premium jewelry advertising through Generative AI.

projects.subtitle: Modern luxury storytelling powered by AI.

projects.subtitle: Building professional brand presence through strategic content.
